## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New component / feature
- [ ] Docs only

## Checklist

- [ ] I edited only `nyx.css` / `nyx.js` (not the generated `components/*.css` or `nyx.min.*`)
- [ ] I ran `node build.js` and committed the regenerated files
- [ ] Verified in both **light** and **dark** themes
- [ ] Verified **RTL / Arabic** where relevant
- [ ] Updated the docs (`docs/docs.js`, and `docs/docs.ar.js`) if behavior/API changed
